Localization.Description: Password spraying in InfoWatch TM. Password spraying is a type of brute-force attack in which an attacker tries the most popular passwords sequentially for each user, which helps avoid blocking the accounts of the attacked users.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful password spraying from host {src.ip} in application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. Attackers obtained the passwords of the following users: {datafield2}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Password spraying attempts from host {src.ip} in application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.

Successful password spraying from host {src.ip} in application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. Attackers obtained the password of user "{subject.account.name}". Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
